name: Peanut Blossoms # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients with a mixer on the lowest speed until dough forms.
2. Shape into balls and roll in sugar.
3. Place cookies on an ungreased cookie sheet at 375°F (190°C).
4. Bake for 10-12 minutes.
5. Top each cookie with a chocolate kiss immediately.
6. Press down firmly so the cookie cracks around the edge.
7. Makes about 45 cookies.
8. Note: I've made these without the peanut butter before too. They turn out just as good. This recipe was shared with me many years ago by Nancy Miller (millern@andrews.edu).
